name: Medium
description: Access Medium API to publish posts and manage publications.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## Medium API

Publish posts and manage publications on Medium through the Medium REST API.

**Note:** Get your access token at [Medium Settings](https://medium.com/me/settings) under Integration tokens.

Authorization.description: Medium OAuth 2.0 or integration token (Environment variable: MEDIUM_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get Current User
tools.description: Get information about the authenticated Medium user.

tools.name: Create Post
tools.description: Create a new post on Medium under the authenticated user's profile.

authorId.description: The ID of the authenticated user (author of the post)

contentFormat.description: Format of the content: html, markdown

content.description: Body content of the post in the specified format

tags.description: Array of tags for the post (max 5 tags)

canonicalUrl.description: Original URL of the content if cross-posting from another site

license.description: License for the post: all-rights-reserved, cc-40-by, cc-40-by-sa, cc-40-by-nd, cc-40-by-nc, cc-40-by-nc-nd, cc-40-by-nc-sa, cc-40-zero, public-domain

tools.name: Get Publications
tools.description: Get a list of publications that the user is a contributor to.

userId.description: The ID of the Medium user

tools.name: Create Publication Post
tools.description: Create a new post under a specific Medium publication.

publicationId.description: The ID of the publication to post under

contentFormat.description: Format of the content: html, markdown

content.description: Body content of the post in the specified format

tags.description: Array of tags for the post (max 5 tags)

canonicalUrl.description: Original URL of the content if cross-posting from another site

tools.name: Get Publication Contributors
tools.description: Get a list of contributors (editors and writers) for a specific publication.

tools.name: Get User Posts
tools.description: Get a list of posts published by a specific Medium user.

userId.description: The ID of the Medium user whose posts to retrieve

tools.name: Get Publication
tools.description: Get information about a specific Medium publication.

publicationId.description: The ID of the Medium publication
